title: Final end-to-end verification of realtime Polymarket market stream Stage 1
objective: Prove that true live Polymarket marks now flow end-to-end from runtime market stream into state_hub and through /api/stream/state SSE for tracked open positions.
acceptance_criteria: SSE shows mark_source = polymarket_stream for at least one tracked position
state_hub -> SSE path is proven end-to-end
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Verification only unless a hard failure is proven.
